description: Title and type normalization rules for BookLive raw file.

type_overrides.comment: Raw titles whose 版面 rows are consistently typed EB in the official monthly INPUT_JP ledgers.
titles: 俺だけレベルMAXなビギナー

type_overrides.comment: Raw titles that should be typed WR (web raw / full-book WT) when wt=WT.

title_aliases.comment: Full-title rewrites where GT uses a completely different title than raw.
title_aliases.from_raw: 融点〜とけあい〜[完全版]【特装版】
タランタランタラン~鳴り響く音にのせて【タテヨミ】

title_aliases.comment: [完全版]→【完全版】 + space additions for sabage case.
title_aliases.from_raw: サベージ・キャッスル〜堕落の迷宮〜[完全版]【タテヨミ】
title_aliases.to_gt: サベージ・キャッスル ~堕落の迷宮~ 【完全版】

title_rewrites_by_context.comment: When wt=版面 and raw title has no 【分冊版】 marker, some titles get 【分冊版】 appended in GT.
titles_needing_bunsatsu_suffix: ワケあり姉妹の恋模様

title_rewrites_by_context.comment: When wt=版面 and raw title ends with 【分冊版】, some titles DROP the suffix in GT.
titles_dropping_bunsatsu_suffix: 堅物上司に今日もイン！

title_rewrites_by_context.comment: When wt=WT, 【タテヨミ】 is stripped unless GT retains it (resolved via best-match).
title_rewrites_by_context.note: Implemented via variant set in parser; no hardcoded list.

amounts.before_tax_income_jpy: raw.権利元取分(税込) — i.e. raw already computes it as pre + ctax
amounts.note: GT may differ from raw.権利元取分(税込) by -1 yen on ~40% of rows due to Excel ROUND quirks (tolerance ±1).
